site.welcomeText: Your digital guest guide — everything you need during your stay in the beautiful Lefkada!
site.heroAlt: Illustrated hero view for Vardania Smart Stay

wifi.title: WiFi Information
wifi.notes: Demo Wi-Fi credentials for the second property.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.arrival: Self-check-in after 16:00. Use the blue lockbox beside the gate. The keybox code will be sent to you privately before your arrival. Please check your booking messages.
accommodation.keybox: The blue keybox is mounted beside the garden entrance.
accommodation.map: Use the property address in your booking confirmation or the map section in this guide.
accommodation.checkout: Check-out is by 10:30. Lock the balcony door before you leave.
accommodation.late_checkout: Late check-out depends on the next booking. Message the host first.
accommodation.air_condition: Bedroom and living-room remotes are on the dining shelf.
accommodation.bbq: Portable grill available on request for stays longer than two nights.
accommodation.hot_water: Solar water heating is strongest after midday.
accommodation.breakfast: Tea, rusks and jam are available for the first morning.
accommodation.consumables: Please leave beach towels and chargers inside the apartment.

house_rules.title: House Rules
rules: Shake sand off before entering from the beach.

transport.title: Transportation
transport.info: Parking is available opposite the apartment and local taxis know the address.

restaurants.title: Restaurants & Cafes
restaurants.intro: Demo local recommendations for the seaside property.

attractions.title: Local Attractions
attractions.intro: Suggested sights around the second property.

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.text: Mini market is 3 minutes away by foot.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy.text: Nearest pharmacy is in Nidri center.

cafes.title: Cafes
cafes.text: Seafront coffee bars are a short walk from the apartment.

gas.title: Gas Station
gas.text: Gas station is on the main coastal road.
